patch.take: The changelog looks small. Then I played a night of comp and losing the opening duel stopped deciding the round.

hotTakes: I keep losing my opening duel on 10.05 and winning the round anyway. Best patch this year.
I rewatched the yetujey clip five times and I still don't think the peek decided that map.
Vitality look like the only team in London that scrimmed real comps. Jamppi is playing like it.
